title: Bedrock Water
description: A way for java players to have the same water as bedrock which includes the colors and animation
body:
# Bedrock water

With this texture pack you can have the water from bedrock edition which is 

+ Water colors

+ Water animation

+ Both animation and colors aka Bedrock water

## NOTES

IF YOU WANT THE WATER COLORS YOU NEED COLORMATIC, VANADIUM OR OPTIFINE

ALL OTHERS ARE VANILA

Recently Mojang changed bedrocks water to match java but I still have the old bedrock water texture

## DOWNLOADS

+ [Colormatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/colormatic/versions) (1.19.2)

+ [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) 

+ [Vanadium](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanadium) (1.20.1 - 1.20.2)

+ [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) 1.20.1 - 1.21.1)
